name: Cranberry-Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, unbleached all-purpose flour, sugar, baking powder, and orange rind.
2. Add the egg, vegetable oil, orange juice, cranberries, and chopped walnuts to the dry ingredients.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well blended.
4. Pour the batter into an oiled 9 x 5 inch loaf pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes.
6. Allow the bread to cool for 6 minutes before removing it from the pan.
7. Cool completely on a wire rack.
8. Store in a plastic bag or aluminum foil for at least one day before slicing.
